chunks.title: Confession of Sin
chunks.reason: David acknowledges his specific transgressions against God.

chunks.title: Prayer for Cleansing and Renewal
chunks.reason: A plea for inner purification and restoration of the spirit.

chunks.title: Promise of Praise and True Sacrifice
chunks.reason: David contrasts external rituals with the internal attitude God desires.

chunks.title: Prayer for Zion
chunks.reason: A concluding petition for the restoration of Jerusalem and acceptable worship.
